description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in rugged, asymmetrical clothing suitable for an urban or post-apocalyptic environment. He wears a sleeveless tunic with a tattered hem, layered over fitted leggings, and is equipped with metallic shoulder armor and forearm guards. A thick scarf is wrapped around his neck, and a utility pouch is strapped to his waist, suggesting readiness for action or travel. His left arm is wrapped in bandages, while the right arm is armored, adding to the sense of a practical, battle-ready outfit. The footwear consists of sturdy, close-fitting boots, and his hair is styled in a short, spiked cut. The overall appearance is that of a resourceful pedestrian, possibly a survivor or urban explorer.
description: A rugged adult male in asymmetrical, armored clothing with a scarf, utility pouch, and sturdy boots, styled for an urban or post-apocalyptic setting. He has a short, spiked hairstyle and a practical, ready-for-action look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the layered tunic, scarf, armored right arm, bandaged left arm, and utility pouch at the waist.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bandaged left arm, the profile of the scarf, and the pouch on the hip.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the crossed straps of the armor, the back of the scarf, and the tattered hem of the tunic.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the metallic arm guard, the fitted boots, and the layered clothing details.
attribute_clothing_type: asymmetrical tunic with tattered hem, fitted leggings, metallic shoulder and forearm armor, thick scarf, utility pouch, and sturdy boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
